mapper.insert: insert into fp_metric_sample (id, tenant_id, config_id, metric_definition_id, metric_code, object_type, object_id, object_code, infrastructure_type, infrastructure_id, instance, series_type, quality, metric_value, collected_at, metadata_json, created_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{configId}, #{metricDefinitionId}, #{metricCode}, #{objectType}, #{objectId}, #{objectCode}, #{infrastructureType}, #{infrastructureId}, #{instance}, #{seriesType}, #{quality}, #{value}, #{collectedAt}, #{metadataJson}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select * from fp_metric_sample where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and config_id = #{configId} and series_type = 'AGGREGATE' and instance = '__TOTAL__' order by collected_at desc limit 1
